nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南马托格罗索州
nodes.summary: 南马托格罗索州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Speckled chachalaca、蓝眼地鸠等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛

nodes.summary: 康塞普西翁省 (巴拉圭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Blaze-winged parakeet、金领金刚鹦鹉、Planalto foliage-gleaner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Blaze-winged parakeet
nodes.summary: Blaze-winged parakeet（Blaze-winged parakeet，学名 Pyrrhura devillei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 上巴拉圭省
nodes.summary: 上巴拉圭省（Alto Paraguay）是巴拉圭的一個省，位於該國西北部。面積82,349 平方公里，2002年人口15,008 人。首府奧林波堡。 下分3縣。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blaze-winged parakeet is found in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul and in northeastern Paraguay's Alto Paraguay and Concepción departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blaze-winged parakeet is found in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul and in northeastern Paraguay's Alto Paraguay and Concepción departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blaze-winged parakeet is found in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso do Sul and in northeastern Paraguay's Alto Paraguay and Concepción departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Though the type specimen is noted as having been collected in Bolivia, the area is now believed to be part of Paraguay. Undocumented sight records in Argentina lead the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to list it as hypothetical in that country. The blaze-winged parakeet inhabits parts of the Pantanal and Chaco, where it occurs mostly in deciduous and gallery forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is also found in the ecotones between those habitats and adjoining scrublands and savannah

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Logging, conversion of habitat to small-scale farming and ranching, and the pet trade are potential threats but none of them appear to be major problems. The species is considered rare to uncommon in Paraguay and locally common in Brazil
